reference: I will suggest you use Ayurvedic medicine, Tablet Yogaraj Gugglu, two tablets twice a day, and Shallaki, one tablet three times a day. It will help in curing your issue.
text: I will suggest you use iron folic medicine, tablet, Yogaraj Sugru, two tablets twice a day, and Shallak, one tablet three times a day. It will help in curing your issue.
